title: Pseudo-ranking tools for hot files, heuristic files, and team ownership
purpose: Provides database queries to retrieve ranked lists of files based on priority, touch counts, and team ownership for a given project.
module_context: Exports three asynchronous functions for querying pseudo-database tables to retrieve hot files, heuristic files, and team ownership data.

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo-database handle for the specified project.
Execute a database query to fetch hot files ordered by priority in descending order.
Limit the results to the specified number of entries.
Return the retrieved hot file records.

methods.name: pseudo_list_heuristic_files
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, opts?: { limit?: number; orderBy?: 'priority' | 'lines' | 'file_path' }): Promise<HeuristicFile[]>

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo-database handle for the specified project.
Determine the sorting column and direction based on provided options.
Execute a database query to fetch heuristic files matching the specified criteria.
Apply the determined sorting and limit the results.
Return the retrieved heuristic file records.
Initialize the pseudo-database handle for the specified project.
Execute a database query to aggregate file counts and touch totals by owner.
Filter out files with null or empty owner values.
Group the results by owner and order them by total touches in descending order.
Return the aggregated team ownership records.
